transcript: Speaker A: Bro I finally cracked this interview! Aur next week se joining bhi hai. Aur mujhe toh bahut... [Bro I finally cracked this interview! And joining is from next week. And I am very...] Speaker B: Hey bro, what happened? Speaker A: I finally landed a job after getting rejected from 7-8 companies. Speaker B: Congratulations! How did you do that? Speaker A: Dekho aaj kal toh har kisi ke paas same degree hai, but communication skills har kisi ke paas nahi hai. Isiliye maine SpeakX use karke apni communication aur English strong kar di. [Look, nowadays everyone has the same degree, but not everyone has communication skills. That's why I used SpeakX to make my communication and English strong.] Speaker B: SpeakX? What's that? Speaker A: SpeakX ek AI-powered English learning app hai. Main roz bas 10 se 15 minute uske AI teacher ke saath practice karta hoon. AI teacher call pe baat karke meri mistakes batata hai, aur dheere dheere meri English fluency improve ho gayi. My confidence is on the next level after using SpeakX. Agar kisi ko bhi interview crack karna hai na, toh apni communication improve karo, SpeakX use karke. [SpeakX is an AI-powered English learning app. I practice for just 10 to 15 minutes daily with its AI teacher. The AI teacher talks on call and tells me my mistakes, and slowly my English fluency improved. My confidence is on the next level after using SpeakX. If anyone wants to crack an interview, improve your communication using SpeakX.]

summary: A young man shares how he cracked a job interview after multiple rejections by improving his English communication skills using the SpeakX app. He demonstrates the app's AI teacher feature, which corrects mistakes during practice calls. He encourages viewers to use SpeakX to boost confidence and clear interviews.
